name: ChkStart_SignalCycleTimeViolation
title: ChkStart_SignalCycleTimeViolation
syntax: dword ChkStart_SignalCycleTimeViolation (Signal ObservedSignal, duration MinCycleTime, duration MaxCycleTime);
dword ChkStart_SignalCycleTimeViolation (Signal ObservedSignal, duration MinCycleTime, duration MaxCycleTime, char[] CaplCallback);
description: Checks the occurrences of a signal.
An event will be generated, if the time between two consecutive signal occurrences is out of the specified range.

parameters.name: ObservedSignal
parameters.description: Signal to observe. It must exist in DB
Minimum cycle time shall not be checked
Maximum cycle time shall not be checked

parameters.name: CaplCallback
parameters.description: Name of CAPL callback function to be called on generated event. In simulation nodes this parameter has to be set. In test modules this parameter is optional.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
